arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes shock admission after claiming first win since taking over as Man United boss from Erik ten Hag and hails 'special' Old Trafford fans for 'making me feel at home'
arts.sum: United secured a crucial 3-2 win over Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League for just their second victory in the campaign, but perhaps more importantly, it was the first of the Amorim era at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'All of a sudden' - Fresh Ruben Amorim Man United verdict delivered after first win in Europa League
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim picked up his first win in charge of Man United with their 3-2 triumph at home to Bodo/Glimt

arts.ttl: Man Utd 3-2 Bodo/Glimt: Match report and talking points as Hojlund double seals Amorim's first win
arts.sum: Manchester United needed a resilient display and a tactical shift to secure just a second Europa League win of the season as Norwegian side Bodo/Glimt arrived at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Højlund brace helps Amorim to first Man Utd win
arts.sum: Manchester United came from behind to beat Bodo/Glimt 3-2 in the Europa League and secure their first victory under new manager Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Robbie Savage explains why Ruben Amorim's 3-4-3 system WON'T be an immediate success at Man United
arts.sum: Amorim guided Sporting Lisbon to two Portuguese titles while favouring the formation but has had mixed results with the formation so far at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'It worked' - Rasmus Hojlund reveals instruction from Ruben Amorim before Manchester United goal
arts.sum: Man Utd won 3-2 against Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League on Thursday and Rasmus Hojlund was the matchwinner.

arts.ttl: Højlund sinks Bodø/Glimt to give Amorim first Manchester United win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim received a rapturous welcome from the Old Trafford congregation, then oversaw a helter-skelter victory in his first home game as Manchester United’s sixth No 1 of the post-Sir Alex Ferguson era. Like the five predecessors of the past 11 years, Amorim suffered. Under Europa League lights that shone down on the 6,714 partying Bodø/Glimt support, this was a standard welcome to the Theatre of Thrills and Spills as his new team just about made it through to the win. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd Fans Hail 'Wonderful' Performance From £250k-p/w Star vs Bodo/Glimt
arts.sum: Manchester United fans have sung the praises of Mason Mount following the midfielder's performance in United's 3-2 win over Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund delivers Ruben Amorim his first win but chaotic victory shows same Manchester United problems
arts.sum: Manchester United 3-2 Bodo/Glimt: Hojlund struck twice in an imperfect performance that nonetheless showed the adaptability the new manager will require

arts.ttl: Rangers pile on misery for Sir Jim Ratcliffe as Man Utd not the only headache for INEOS supremo
arts.sum: Rangers cruised to a massive Europa League win over Ratcliffe's other side
